plumber-1.text: Excellent service! Saman fixed our kitchen leak quickly and professionally. Highly recommended!
Very reliable plumber. Came on time and sorted our bathroom pipes. Fair pricing too.

plumber-2.text: Sunil was very professional. Fixed our water heater issue in no time.
Great experience. Clean work and explained everything clearly.

plumber-3.text: Kamala did a wonderful job with our pipe installation. Very thorough.

plumber-4.text: Rohan is excellent. Fixed multiple leaks in our old house. Very satisfied.

plumber-5.text: Nimal did a great job with our bathroom renovation plumbing.

electrician-1.text: Dilshan rewired our entire house. Professional and safe. Very happy!
Fixed our electrical panel issue. Knowledgeable and efficient.

electrician-2.text: Nirosha installed new outlets. Clean work, fair price.

electrician-3.text: Chandima did beautiful lighting for our living room. Highly recommended!

electrician-4.text: Good electrical repair work. Tharanga was punctual and helpful.

electrician-5.text: Manjula fixed our faulty wiring. Very professional.

gardener-1.text: Bandula transformed our backyard. Amazing landscaping work!
Our lawn has never looked better. Regular maintenance is excellent.

gardener-2.text: Sunethra created a beautiful flower garden. Very talented!

gardener-3.text: Ajith maintains our garden perfectly. Hedge trimming was top notch.

gardener-4.text: Ruwani keeps our garden tidy. Reliable service.

gardener-5.text: Thusitha did great lawn care and pruning. Would recommend.

carpenter-1.text: Asela repaired our antique table beautifully. Master craftsman!
Custom cabinet work was excellent. Very skilled carpenter.

carpenter-2.text: Indika fitted new doors. Perfect fit and finish.

carpenter-3.text: Nadeeka assembled our furniture and did repairs. Very pleased!

carpenter-4.text: Kumara built custom shelving. Quality workmanship.

carpenter-5.text: Chamari fixed our wooden chairs. Good repair work.

painter-1.text: Roshan painted our whole house. Flawless finish, very professional!
Excellent exterior painting. Clean work and great colors.

painter-2.text: Sajeewani did our living room. Beautiful results.

painter-3.text: Nuwan's color suggestions were perfect. Interior looks amazing!

painter-4.text: Dilhani did touch-ups and repainting. Very neat work.

painter-5.text: Lasantha painted our bedroom. Good quality, fair price.
